input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.11.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.11.2
            TITLE: rain test conduct

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.11.2: Rain Test Conduct
IN.11.2 Rain Test Conduct 
The water spray will be rain like, not a direct high pressure water jet 
a. Spray water at the vehicle from any possible direction for 120 seconds 
b. Stop the water spray 
c. Observe the vehicle for 120 seconds

final_answer: rule IN.11.2: Rain Test Conduct IN.11.2 Rain Test Conduct The water spray will be rain like, not a direct high pressure water jet a. Spray water at the vehicle from any possible direction for 120 seconds b. Stop the water spray c. Observe the vehicle for 120 seconds
